Send it to a friend to play!

Policies shape everyday life in the emergency department, influencing scheduling, pay, wellness, leadership opportunities, and retention. 

Today, you're in charge of building the most equitable and high-functioning ED from the ground up.

You will encounter 7 rounds of 4 policy options, with the goal of getting your ED to be ON-SHIFT ready:

O - Operations
N - Networking and Career Growth

S - Safety and Culture
H - Health and Wellness
I - Inclusion and Equity
F - Flexibility and Caregiving
T - Time and Scheduling

Each policy option will have a certain cost associated with its complexity, as well as hidden positives and negatives. You can only pick one!

LEFT click to SELECT a policy - RIGHT click to UNDO. You MUST have a policy in each category in order to proceed!

Be careful, you have a limit of $100 - you will need to decide what matters most. Good luck!
